name: Kinesis Monitor
description: Monitor an AWS Kinesis Data Stream for new records and trigger jobs when records are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new records are detected in the Kinesis stream shards

outputs.description: Passes record information (stream, shard, sequence_number, partition_key, data_b64, arrival_timestamp) to triggered jobs via run_config

stream_name.label: Stream Name
stream_name.description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream to monitor

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when records are detected

max_records_per_shard.label: Max Records Per Shard
max_records_per_shard.description: Maximum number of records to read per shard per evaluation

initial_position.label: Initial Position
initial_position.description: Where to start reading on first run

enumLabels.LATEST: LATEST (only new records from now on)

region_name.label: AWS Region
region_name.description: AWS region name. Uses default boto3 region if not set.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
